flow_points: West Indies established a strong Powerplay foundation, scoring 48 runs for 2 wickets at an 8.0 run rate.
SD Hope anchored West Indies' innings, contributing a significant 75 runs from 46 balls, which was 45.5% of the team's total.
Italy's chase started poorly, managing only 37 runs for 3 wickets in their Powerplay (RR 6.17).
Losing 3 Powerplay wickets prevented Italy from building a stable foundation.
MW Forde delivered a crucial bowling spell, taking 3 wickets for only 19 runs from 4 overs.
S Joseph applied significant defensive pressure with an impactful spell, claiming 4 wickets for 30 runs from 4 overs.
Joseph's spell was a key turning point, finishing with an impact score of 139.53.
Italy struggled under extreme chase pressure, indicated by an index of 99.0.
This chase pressure ultimately led to Italy's late-innings collapse.
West Indies secured a decisive victory by 42 runs.
